title: AI-Based Image Processing for Social Good
abstract: Research on applying computer vision and deep learning techniques to solve real-world problems in education, transportation, and public safety domains.

title: NLP-Based Spell Correction Using Word2Vec
abstract: An intelligent spell checker leveraging Word2Vec embeddings for context-aware spelling correction and word suggestions using NLP techniques.

title: Applied ML for Education Technology
abstract: Research exploring machine learning applications in e-learning platforms to personalize content delivery and improve learning outcomes.
